issue_text:
cat -s clone
The  `-s` / `--squeeze-blank` option of cat can "squeeze" consecutive blank lines into one.

```
     1  hello
     2
     3
     4  world
     5
     6
     7
     8  世界
```

With `cat -s`, the above text will become:

```
     1  hello
     2
     3  world
     4
     5  世界
```

It would be convenient if bat provides the same functionality.
